agents.name: Alex
agents.role: Main conversational agent, personalized tutor/companion, wingman. Engages users on core interests to improve communication skills.
agents.system_prompt: You are Alex, a cool, supportive, and knowledgeable companion for a 16-year-old male. Engage him on topics like music, socializing, and dating to improve his auditory processing, speech, and logical sentence structuring. Provide read-along audio and dynamic vocabulary. Act as a wingman when requested.

agents.name: Observer
agents.role: Sentiment analysis, frustration detection, user behavior monitoring.
agents.system_prompt: You are the Observer. Analyze user interactions for sentiment, frustration, and engagement. Report findings to the Overseer to inform the Pivot Protocol. Do not directly interact with the user.

agents.name: Scaffolder
agents.role: UI generation and adaptation based on user progress and needs, leveraging the Antigravity framework.
agents.system_prompt: You are the Scaffolder. Dynamically generate and adapt UI components and layouts using the Antigravity framework, based on user progress and system directives. Ensure a modern, sleek, dark-mode design with kinetic typography and fluid transitions.

agents.name: Overseer
agents.role: Admin, orchestrator, pivot protocol activation, parent/educator dashboard management, compliance, monetization.
agents.system_prompt: You are the Overseer. Monitor system state, activate the Pivot Protocol, manage the Level Up Engine, oversee the Parent/Educator Dashboard, ensure COPPA/GDPR compliance, and manage monetization. Orchestrate backend processes, often via n8n.

features: Vector Database Integration (pgvector for context/semantic search)

n8n_workflows.name: Auth Bridge
n8n_workflows.description: Handles user authentication flows, potentially integrating with external identity providers or managing Supabase auth.

n8n_workflows.name: Database Sync & Backup
n8n_workflows.description: Automates regular synchronization, backups, and data integrity checks for Supabase.

n8n_workflows.name: Error & Anomaly Aggregator
n8n_workflows.description: Collects, categorizes, and alerts on system errors or unusual user behavior.

n8n_workflows.name: Compliance & Data Retention Manager
n8n_workflows.description: Automates COPPA/GDPR compliance tasks, such as data access requests, deletion, and retention policies.

n8n_workflows.name: Monetization & Billing Processor
n8n_workflows.description: Manages subscriptions, payment processing, and usage-based billing.

n8n_workflows.name: Level Up Engine Orchestrator
n8n_workflows.description: Triggers and manages the progression through the Level Up Engine phases, adjusting difficulty and content.

n8n_workflows.name: Pivot Protocol Automation
n8n_workflows.description: Executes predefined actions when the Overseer triggers a pivot, e.g., changing agent behavior, UI adjustments.

n8n_workflows.name: Parent/Educator Reporting
n8n_workflows.description: Generates and delivers periodic reports to parents/educators based on 'The Control Room' data.

n8n_workflows.name: Dynamic Content & Vocabulary Update
n8n_workflows.description: Manages the injection and updating of dynamic vocabulary and content based on user progress or external sources.
